channel.title: Free on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Free on Arrans github.io

item.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: RocketChat/Rocket.Chat
item.description: The communications platform that puts data protection first.

item.title: Kareadita/Kavita
item.description: Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

item.title: givanz/VvvebJs
item.description: Drag and drop page builder library written in vanilla javascript without dependencies or build tools.

item.title: forwardemail/forwardemail.net
item.description: Privacy-focused encrypted email for everyone. All-in-one alternative to Gmail + Mailchimp + Sendgrid.

item.title: zulip/zulip
item.description: Zulip server and web application. Open-source team chat that helps teams stay productive and focused.

item.title: 0x4447/0x4447_product_s3_email
item.description: 📫 A serverless email server on AWS using S3 and SES
